paper_title: Pollen Analysis and Study Area Characteristics

methods.description: Quantitative analysis of honey samples to classify them into different classes based on pollen types and their frequency of occurrence.

steps.description: Quantitative analysis of the studied honeys classified them mainly into Class I.
steps.searchable_summary: classify honey samples into classes based on pollen analysis

steps.description: A total of 109 pollen types, belonging to 53 botanical families, were identified.
steps.searchable_summary: identify pollen types and their botanical families in honey samples

steps.description: Calculate frequency of occurrence percentage (FO) for pollen types.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate frequency of occurrence for each pollen type

steps.description: Determine the number of pollen types identified per sample.
steps.searchable_summary: count number of pollen types per honey sample
outputs: number of pollen types per sample

steps.description: Analyze diversity of pollen types in honey samples across different seasons.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze seasonal diversity of pollen types in honey samples
